zh.lifeSummary: 當Willem van Lijnden於大約1124年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德布倫連登時，他的父親Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden45歲，母親Helena van Bosinchem36歲。他於1149年與Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1186年在荷蘭武特雷特武特雷特享年63歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Willem van Lijnden于大约1124年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德布倫連登时，他的父亲Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden45岁，母亲Helena van Bosinchem36岁。他于1149年与Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1186年在荷兰武特雷特武特雷特享年63岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Lijnden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): plural form of   Linde  .
Flemish and Dutch (Van Linden): habitational name from any of the places called Linden or Lienden in Brabant and North Brabant.
Flemish and Dutch: shortened form of   Vanderlinden  .

variants.name: Linde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Gunner, Lars.  German Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Fritz, Hasso, Markus, Otto, Ralf.

German, Dutch, and Scandinavian: topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous lime tree, Middle High German, Dutch linde, Scandinavian lind. There are several places, especially in northern Germany, named with this word, and the name may be a habitational name from any of these. The word was also used in a number of Old High German women's personal names, with the meaning ‘shield’ or ‘spear’ (these being made from the hard wood of the lime); it is possible that the surname in some cases is from a short form of one of these. As a Swedish name it is often ornamental rather than topographic. Compare Lindy .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German Linde ‘lime tree’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Willem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Willem van Lijnden was born about 1124, in Lienden, Buren, Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden, was 45 and his mother, Helena van Bosinchem, was 36. He married Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard in 1149. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1186, in Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands, at the age of 63, and was buried in Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Willem van Lijnden est né environ 1124, à Lienden, Buren, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Helena van Bosinchem, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard en 1149. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1186, à Utrecht, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Willem van Lijnden um 1124 in Lienden, Buren, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden 45 und seine Mutter Helena van Bosinchem 36. Er hat 1149 Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1186 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Utrecht, Utrecht, Niederlande und wurde in Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Willem van Lijnden è nato il circa 1124 nel Lienden, Buren, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Helena van Bosinchem, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard nel 1149. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1186, nel Utrecht, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Willem van Lijndenが約1124年にオランダジェルダーランドブレンリーンデンで生まれた時，父Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijndenは45歳，母Helena van Bosinchemは36歳であった。1149年にAgnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1186年にオランダウトレチトウトレチトで63歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Willem van Lijnden(이)가 대략 1124년 네덜란드 글델랜드 버 리든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena van Bosinchem(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1149년 Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1186년 네덜란드 우트레ch트 우트레ch트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레ch트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Willem van Lijnden nasceu aproximadamente 1124, em Lienden, Buren, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Helena van Bosinchem, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard em 1149. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1186, em Utrecht, Utrecht, Países Baixos, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Willem van Lijnden родился около 1124 г. в местности лиенден, бурен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena van Bosinchem, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard в 1149 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1186 г. в местности утречт, утречт, Нидерланды в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Willem van Lijnden nació aproximadamente 1124, en Lienden, Buren, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Arnold Van Aspremont Van Lijnden, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Helena van Bosinchem, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Agnes Sophia van Altena de Montbeliard en 1149. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1186, en Utrecht, Utrecht, Países Bajos, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Utrecht, Países Bajos.
